about.label: 01 / About
about.bio: Full-Stack Developer with experience in scalable web and mobile applications. Specialized in AI integration and automation of processes. I've optimized platforms by 45% in performance and reduced API consumption by 35%.
about.bio2: With 4+ years across the full stack, I specialize in high-performance web apps, AI integrations, and immersive interactive experiences that feel as good as they look.
about.bio3: I thrive at the intersection of engineering precision and creative design — where code becomes art.

contact.label: 07 / Contact
contact.description: Available for freelance projects, full-time positions, and technical collaborations.
